§6Matter Cannon§f:
The §6Matter Cannon §f(appliedenergistics2:matter_cannon) is a §6powered ranged weapon §f that §bfires §6Matter Balls §f and §6Singularities §f as ammo. It is the §6ultimate AE2 weapon §f, capable of massive damage and unique §6matter-compression §f effects.

§6Production Path (tools/matter_cannon.json)§f:
Pattern "aab / cd  / a  " (an asymmetric 3x3 pattern):
- §ba§f: §6Iron Ingot §f(ingotIron) — 5 (top left + middle left + bottom left + bottom middle)
- §bb§f: §6Formation Core §f(appliedenergistics2:material:43) — 1 (top middle)
- §cc§f: §6§e4k§r ME Storage Component §f(appliedenergistics2:material:36) — 1 (middle left)
- §cd§f: §6ME Energy Cell §f(appliedenergistics2:energy_cell) — 1 (centre)
- Yields 1× Matter Cannon

§6Function§f:
- §bAmmo §f: §bMatter Balls §f (low damage) and §bSingularities §f (high damage)
- §bInternal energy §f: stored in its own §6internal §f §b400,000 AE §f buffer
- §bPower cost §f: §b100 AE §f per shot
- §bCharging §f: place in a §6Charger §f to refill its internal buffer
- §bRange §f: §b32 §f blocks
- §bDamage §f: §b6 §f (Matter Ball) to §b20 §f (Singularity)

The jei-graph shows 0 items the Matter Cannon is a component of, but it is referenced in 4 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: pair the §6Matter Cannon §f with a §6Singularity §f for max damage; craft them in the §6Matter Condenser §f
- §eTip§f: the Matter Cannon is §6Cheat-mode §f strong in this modpack — use it carefully in §6multiplayer §f
